//: SMT-LIB countdown FSM. count = is_first_tick ? 3 : _count-1; prints
//2: 'tick' while >0, then 'liftoff' + Exit(0). Mirror of countdown.ev.

fsms.smtlib:
(declare-const count Int)
(declare-const _count Int)
(declare-const is_first_tick Bool)
(declare-const more Bool)
(declare-const done Bool)
(assert (= count (ite is_first_tick 3 (- _count 1))))
(assert (= more (> count 0)))
(assert (= done (<= count 0)))
